nodes.label: Rahul Bhaumik Research
nodes.description: Research across human-computer interaction, soft interfaces, smart textiles, sensing, design pedagogy, AI-supported systems, XR, accessibility, healthcare, and socially responsive design.

nodes.label: HCI and Interaction Design
nodes.description: Human-computer interaction, interaction design, user experience, and interactive systems.

nodes.label: Soft and Deformable Interfaces
nodes.description: Flexible, deformable, material-driven, and embodied interactive interfaces.

nodes.label: Smart Textiles and Wearables
nodes.description: Textile-based interaction systems, conformable sensors, wearable sensing, and smart material interfaces.

nodes.label: Inductive and Magnetic Sensing
nodes.description: Inductive, magnetic, and deformation-aware sensing for soft and physical interfaces.

nodes.label: 3D-Printed Sensors
nodes.description: 3D-printed structures, tunable stiffness, functional materials, and sensor-enabled objects.

nodes.label: Automotive HCI
nodes.description: In-car interaction systems, affective feedback, central console interfaces, and interactive vehicular applications.

nodes.label: Design Pedagogy and Creativity
nodes.description: Design learning, creativity, design thinking, ideation, and pedagogical tools.

nodes.label: XR, AR and Virtual Environments
nodes.description: Virtual reality, augmented reality, immersive environments, and digital visualization systems.

nodes.label: AI and Machine Learning Systems
nodes.description: AI, machine learning, deep learning, intelligent systems, and multimodal computational methods.

nodes.label: Sustainable and Social Design
nodes.description: Technology and design for sustainability, indigenous knowledge, community systems, and base-of-the-pyramid contexts.

nodes.label: Healthcare and Assistive Technology
nodes.description: Healthcare devices, assistive technologies, inclusive systems, accessibility, and medical support tools.

nodes.label: Smart Cities and Built Environment
nodes.description: Smart buildings, urban resilience, smart cities, and built-environment systems.

nodes.label: Educational Technology
nodes.description: Digital learning, gamified learning, online-learning support, and technology-enhanced education.
